jito.selfDealingNotes: No token purchase required. MEV commission required but performance-based.
jito.transparencyNotes: Published criteria, public API, Jito Foundation governance

doublezero.selfDealingNotes: Network membership fee structure, but no token flywheel
doublezero.transparencyNotes: Published criteria, some transparency around selection

blazestake.transparencyNotes: Open governance, published criteria, community voting

jpool.selfDealingNotes: No token purchase required for delegation

phase.selfDealingNotes: No token or self-delegation requirement. Simply prioritizes small validators.
phase.transparencyNotes: Published criteria, open application, clear mission

vault.selfDealingNotes: Validators MUST buy $V tokens and stake through vSOL to qualify. Top 100 vSOL delegators share 40% of undirected stake. Classic token flywheel.
vault.transparencyNotes: Discord-only application, opaque board approval, Votex.so governance

dynosol.transparencyNotes: Limited public documentation on delegation criteria

jagpool.transparencyNotes: Published delegation strategy focused on geographic diversity

marinade.selfDealingNotes: PSR auction model — validators bid for stake, which creates indirect self-dealing pressure
marinade.transparencyNotes: Open source delegation strategy, but PSR auction opaque to outsiders

edgevana.selfDealingNotes: Edgevana infrastructure customers may receive preferential delegation
edgevana.transparencyNotes: Some published criteria, but selection tied to infrastructure business

indiesol.selfDealingNotes: No token requirement, indie validator focused
indiesol.transparencyNotes: Small community pool, limited formal documentation
